commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Redesign homepage: MVP CTA as primary, add value proposition band

- Move mdeeno.com/member to primary hero button (filled blue)
- Move free calculator to secondary ghost button
- Add value-band section explaining 3 key investment blind spots
- Add trust strip (social proof bar)
- Remove mid-page calculator band (was distracting from MVP funnel)
- Add gtag event tracking on all 3 MVP CTAs
- Add premium-note ("24시간 무료") below bottom CTA

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: duplicate ticker spam detection — auto-reject 3+ mint variants in 10min

- src/market/ticker-filter.js: new in-memory tracker; observeTicker(symbol, mint)
  records every contract address seen per symbol in a sliding 10-min window;
  on 3+ distinct mints → logs SPAM DETECTED and flags symbol; flag auto-clears
  when observations age out; getSpamReport() for diagnostics
- dexscreener.js: imports observeTicker + isSpam; calls observeTicker for every
  normalized token BEFORE the seenSymbols dedup gate so all mint variants are
  tracked even when only one would reach the result map; post-filter pass after
  both sources removes any spam-flagged symbol and logs count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: missing stocks + SMA200 on intraday/short timeframes

1. Add 15+ missing Korean stocks (IBK, Woori, Hana, SKT, KT, LG Electronics, etc.)
   to both STOCK_SEARCH_DB and TICKER_TO_KOREAN_NAME

2. Fix SMA200 (200-day moving average) not showing on 1D/1W/1M timeframes:
   - Problem: intraday charts only had 5min/15min candles, so SMA(200)
     calculated 200 candles, not 200 DAYS
   - Solution: fetch 2 years of daily data separately (sma200 timeframe)
     and calculate true 200-day SMA, then map by date to intraday chart
   - For 3M+ timeframes, continue using chart data directly (enough points)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Navigate to dashboard instantly on sign-in, auth completes in background

Firebase Auth can take several seconds to verify credentials. Instead of
blocking the user on the login page during this wait, navigate to the
dashboard immediately and show a loading spinner there while auth finishes.

A sessionStorage flag (authPending) signals the dashboard to hold its
redirect guard open during the in-flight auth request, preventing a
premature redirect back to login.

commit.message:
v31.7: clip ext glows to actual image bounds (fix object-fit:contain margins)

Previous clipPath used full 0,0,100,100 SVG coords, but ext-img uses
object-fit:contain so black pillarbox/letterbox margins exist where the
image doesn't reach. Added updateExtVpClip() which calculates the real
displayed image rect within the container and updates the #ext-vp-clip rect
to match — called on img load, applyViewMode, and sizeAndAlign so it stays
accurate on resize and split-view toggle.

commit.message:
feat: suppress repeated blocked signals with GRASS mechanism

When Claude's top buy is blocked by the mandate for 3+ consecutive cycles
for the same reason, the token is suppressed for 2 cycles:

- src/agent/block-tracker.js: new module — tracks per-token consecutive
  block streaks (normalized reason key, 1.5× cycle-interval streak window),
  triggers 2-cycle suppression on 3rd hit, auto-lifts after 2 cycles
- prompts.js: buildContext accepts suppressedTokens set — filters from
  Momentum Leaders, Sustained Movers, New Launch Signals, DexScreener launches;
  adds "## Suppressed Signals" notice so Claude knows why tokens are missing
- reasoning.js: accepts and forwards suppressedTokens to buildContext
- routes/reason.js: ticks suppression counters at cycle start, passes
  suppressedTokens to reason(), parses violations post-cycle to detect
  blocked buys, appends "GRASS suppressed — repeated block: SYMBOL" to
  decision.riskFlags for the reasoning trace

Framer Motion animations, and glass-morphism navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: Run auth init in background to prevent 1-min page load delay

Previously, DOMContentLoaded awaited AuthModule.init() which calls
supabase.auth.getSession() - a network request. Users with cached
sessions had to wait ~1 minute for Supabase to respond before
the home screen rendered.

Auth now runs in background (non-blocking). Router.init() and
HomeScreen render immediately. Auth UI updates asynchronously
once session is confirmed.

commit.message:
security(hardening): add request body size limit and embedding model validation

Prevents two real attack vectors: (1) CWE-400 memory exhaustion via oversized
POST bodies that bypass Pydantic validation and rate limiting — new middleware
rejects requests exceeding MAX_BODY_BYTES (64KB default) before buffering.
(2) CWE-73 path traversal/SSRF via poisoned EMBEDDING_MODEL env var — startup
validation rejects filesystem paths, URLs, and shell metacharacters. 280 tests.

commit.message:
fix: use window.location.search instead of useSearchParams for Shopify CSE handoff

Next.js useSearchParams() returns stale/cached values on subsequent
cross-domain navigations, causing the second image load from
cakesandmemories.com to fail. Switch to reading window.location.search
directly and use window.history.replaceState for URL cleanup to bypass
the Next.js router cache entirely.
